summary: Frontend translation testing for POS, Tables, Ratings, Expenses, and SmartReports pages. Found translation issues where Arabic text is not being translated to English when language is changed.

ui_bugs.issue: Category names (المشروبات, الوجبات الرئيسية, المقبلات, الحلويات) are not translated to English. Line 869: {cat.name} should be {t(cat.name)}
Table section names (داخلي, خارجي) are not translated. Line 1112: {section} should be {t(section)}
Section headers (داخلي, خارجي) are not translated. Line 367: {section} should be {t(section)}
Section dropdown options are not translated. Line 299: {section} should be {t(section)}
Expense category names (إيجار, كهرباء وماء, غاز, رواتب, صيانة, مستلزمات, تسويق, نقل, أخرى) are not translated. getCategoryName function at line 195 should return t(cat.name) instead of cat.name
Category dropdown options at line 378: {cat.name} should be {t(cat.name)}
Category filter dropdown at line 262: {cat.name} should be {t(cat.name)}

action_items: POS.js line 869: Change {cat.name} to {t(cat.name)} for category names
POS.js line 1112: Change {section} to {t(section)} for table section tabs
Tables.js line 299: Change {section} to {t(section)} in SelectItem for section dropdown
Tables.js line 367: Change {section} to {t(section)} for section headers
Expenses.js line 195: Change return cat.name to return t(cat.name) in getCategoryName function
Expenses.js line 262: Change {cat.name} to {t(cat.name)} in category filter dropdown
Expenses.js line 378: Change {cat.name} to {t(cat.name)} in add expense dialog category dropdown
Expenses.js line 425: Change {getCategoryName(cat)} to {t(getCategoryName(cat))} or fix getCategoryName to use t()
critical_code_review_comments: The t() translation function is imported but not consistently applied to dynamic data from database/constants
DEFAULT_EXPENSE_CATEGORIES and DEFAULT_SECTIONS arrays contain Arabic text that needs t() wrapping when rendered
Product names in SmartReports show 'غير معروف' (Unknown) - this is database data, not a UI translation issue

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Ratings and Expenses pages fully translated, POS and Tables have translation issues

context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation testing for Arabic to English. The autoTranslate.js file has all the translations defined, but the t() function is not being applied to dynamic data in POS.js, Tables.js, and Expenses.js. Ratings page is fully translated. SmartReports page UI is translated but product names from database show Arabic.

pages_tested.POS: FAIL - Category names and table sections not translated
pages_tested.Tables: FAIL - Section headers and dropdown not translated
pages_tested.SmartReports: PASS - UI text translated (product names are database data)
